nasb.text: Then the whole congregation sent word and spoke to the sons of Benjamin who were at the rock of Rimmon, and proclaimed peace to them.

esv.text: Then the whole congregation sent word to the people of Benjamin who were at the rock of Rimmon and proclaimed peace to them.

cnv.text: 全體會眾又派人到臨門的磐石那裡，對便雅憫人說話，向他們宣告和平。

ccb.text: 全体会众又派人到临门岩去跟便雅悯人讲和。
